final:
module RefModule(
    
    input [15:0] extendee,
    input ExtSel,
    
    output reg[31:0] result
    );integer obf_i;
    
    

    always @(ExtSel or extendee) begin
            for(obf_i = 0; obf_i < 16; obf_i = obf_i + 1) begin
                result[obf_i] <= extendee[obf_i];
            end 
            
            if(ExtSel) begin
                for(obf_i = 16; obf_i < 32; obf_i = obf_i + 1) begin
                    result[obf_i] = extendee[15];
                end 
            end else begin 
                for(obf_i = 16; obf_i < 32; obf_i = obf_i + 1) begin
                    result[obf_i] = 0;
                end
            end
    end

endmodule
